base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of goomba_shoe_mario — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 3. Kuribo's Shoe Mario (green boot) — hop-only movement, tramples spikes. Rare 1-level power-up (World 5-3). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
